case.title: DODGE v. MENASHA WOOD SPLIT-PULLEY CO

opinion.h: DODGE v. MENASHA WOOD SPLIT-PULLEY CO, 169 U.S. 738 (1898)
DODGE et al. v. MENASHA WOOD SPLIT-PULLEY CO. et al. No. 602.
opinion.p: Edward Rector filed brief in opposition to petition by leave of court.
No opinion. Petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States circuit court of appeals for the Seventh circuit denied. See 30 C. C. A. 455, 86 Fed. 904.
